overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring neon-lit streets, elevated highways, and holographic advertisements. The player character walks along wet sidewalks beneath overpasses, turns at intersections, and passes through areas with heavy vehicle traffic and commercial signage. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-fidelity game engine graphics with vibrant neon lighting and detailed urban environments.

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket walks past the camera from right to left
approaching intersection where the covered sidewalk opens to the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing pedestrians and debris

pedestrian in red jacket walking past the camera

green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. The left side features a graffiti-covered wall while the right side has a metal guard rail separating the path from the street. Pedestrians walk toward and past the camera, and digital billboards are visible in the distance under the overpass structure.

events.description: camera turns right at the intersection, leaving the covered sidewalk
large orange construction excavator becomes visible on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and proceeding along the new street, passing construction equipment

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: tall commercial building with large green 'softsys' neon signage
large orange construction vehicle with extended arm
yellow and black striped construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at an intersection, transitioning from the covered sidewalk to an open street. The Softsys building with its distinctive green neon signage dominates the left side, while a large orange construction excavator sits on the right. Traffic barriers line the street, and the elevated highway structure now appears on the left side of the frame.

events.description: Moonchies building with large pink holographic advertisement comes into view on the right
heavy traffic of futuristic vehicles passing by on the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial street, observing the heavy traffic and large holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: teal futuristic sports car with headlights on driving past
yellow taxi cab stopped on the side of the road

entered.detail: large commercial building with illuminated 'Moonchies' signage on the facade
large-scale pink holographic projection of a woman on the building side
curved ramp structure connecting to the main highway
tall tree with distinctive red foliage

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a vibrant commercial street dominated by the Moonchies building and its massive pink holographic advertisement. Heavy traffic of futuristic vehicles fills the multi-lane street, while the elevated highway ramp curves overhead on the left. The lighting becomes predominantly neon, with pink and cyan hues illuminating the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: street beneath overpass with urban decay

events.description: damaged abandoned vehicle visible on the right side of the street
entering covered area beneath another overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street past abandoned vehicles and under the overpass, moving into a more enclosed urban space

entered.detail: wrecked car with open doors and missing wheels on the roadside
concrete overpass creating a tunnel-like effect ahead
tall concrete wall with metal fencing on top
metal security fence running along the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves past the commercial district into a more decayed urban area beneath an overpass. An abandoned damaged car sits on the right roadside, while the left side features a concrete retaining wall with chain-link fencing. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera approaches and enters the underpass structure, with artificial lighting becoming the dominant light source.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins by walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered walls and pedestrians under the shadow of the overpass. As the camera reaches an intersection, the view turns right and transitions from the covered walkway into the open street. The scene then expands to reveal the towering Softsys building with its vibrant green neon signage on the left, while an orange construction excavator and traffic barriers emerge on the right. Finally, the perspective opens up to the broader cityscape as the elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district into a dark and decaying urban underpass. It begins on a bustling street dominated by the massive pink holographic advertisement of the Moonchies building, where futuristic vehicles fill multi-lane roads beneath a curving elevated highway ramp. As the camera moves forward, the brilliant pink and cyan hues reflecting off the wet pavement gradually fade, shifting the atmosphere from commercial splendor to urban neglect. The scene then opens into a more desolate area featuring a damaged abandoned car and a concrete retaining wall topped with chain-link fencing. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed and dim as the camera enters the shadow of an overpass, where artificial lighting replaces the glow of the city.
